market.summary: KOSPI and global markets are navigating high volatility due to geopolitical tensions in the Middle East.
key_points: Oil prices remain volatile, impacting global inflation expectations.
Investors are closely watching the FOMC 'Higher for longer' stance.
Focus on resilient sectors like AI infrastructure and energy hedges.

Damien Hirst Retrospective at MMCA Seoul.
Kim Yun-shin Retrospective at Hoam Museum of Art.

FT.raw: Good morning! It's Friday, March 20th, 2026. The market remains cautious as we track geopolitical developments and energy prices. Focus today is on portfolio resilience and staying updated on AI regulation news.
